name: ai-task-board
summary: XUANJIAN 的任务状态层，展示任务分级、项目范围、角色分工和 G1-G7 Gate 进度。
purpose: 配合 superpowers 驱动的开发流程，记录任务大小、当前 Gate、项目/场景范围、角色、验证方式、阻塞恢复点和面板可视化状态。

source.whenToRead: Read the full scene when task state, G1-G7 progress, project scope, role state, or dashboard-visible progress matters.

whyThisComposition: This scene records the task state around the superpower-driven workflow so future panels can show scope, gate, roles, and progress clearly.

operationGuide.startup: Load entry/profile/task JSON first, then read the scene markdown only if the workflow is selected.
notes: Superpowers drive the workflow; this scene records task-board state, not a software runtime.
Use G1-G7 as dashboard-visible task state for L3/L4 or when explicit intake/discovery/plan/handoff/acceptance tracking is needed.

readPolicy.notes: Do not load every project in the scene. Select projects based on the user request first.
